title: NFDC Digital Projectionist cum Theatre Technician Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
shortInfo: National Film Development Corporation (NFDC) Digital Projectionist cum Theatre Technician Notification 2026 has been released on 18-05-2026 on the official website of National Film Development Corporation (NFDC). A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NFDC Digital Projectionist cum Theatre Technician Recruitment 2026.

basic_details.job_title: NFDC Digital Projectionist cum Theatre Technician Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Film Development Corporation (NFDC) Digital Projectionist cum Theatre Technician Notification 2026 has been released on 18-05-2026 on the official website of National Film Development Corporation (NFDC). A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NFDC Digital Projectionist cum Theatre Technician Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate Degree from a recognized University/Institute
qualification.details: Graduate Degree from a recognized University/Institute

salary_details.details: Consolidated pay of Rs. 60,000/- all inclusive per month.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NFDC Digital Projectionist cum Theatre Technician Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 28-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NFDC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NFDC Digital Projectionist cum Theatre Technician recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the NFDC Digital Projectionist cum Theatre Technician post is 28th May 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Graduate Degree from a recognized University or Institute to be eligible for the Digital Projectionist cum Theatre Technician position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Digital Projectionist cum Theatre Technician role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 45 years. There is no minimum age specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Digital Projectionist cum Theatre Technician post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Digital Projectionist cum Theatre Technician in the National Film Development Corporation.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for this contractual position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated pay of Rs. 60,000/- per month, which is all-inclusive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment primarily involves an Application Screening stage. Further details might be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for applying to this post?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The job is on a contractual basis, meaning it is for a fixed term as per the terms of the contract.

faq.question: Q9. In which city will the selected candidate be posted?
faq.answer: The job location for this position is Pune, Maharashtra.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the online application link in the "Important Links" section of this article. Always refer to the official website for the most accurate information.
